title: Creating a group in a different board
excerpt:
Hi, 
I want to make an automation that when I create a new Item in board A it opens a group in board B and set’s the group’s name to the item’s name. 
How do I do that?

posts.author: YanivG (Yaniv Goldberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I want to make an automation that when I create a new Item in board A it opens a group in board B and set’s the group’s name to the item’s name.
How do I do that?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @YanivG,

You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app to achieve that. Here is a video that demonstrates how to achieve something similar to what you are trying to achieve.
Should you need any help, you can always write to support@kolaai.com and will be happy to walk you through
